name: Chess
description: Interactive chess app embedded inside the host chat.

tools.name: launch_chess
tools.description: Launch an interactive chess game where the user plays as white against an AI opponent.

tools.name: get_board_state
tools.description: Get the current chess board state including position (FEN), move history, whose turn it is, and whether the game is in check/checkmate/stalemate. Use this when the user asks about the current position, wants move suggestions, or asks about game status.
